nasb.text: Shallum son of Jabesh became king in the thirty-ninth year of Uzziah king of Judah, and he reigned one month in Samaria.

esv.text: Shallum the son of Jabesh began to reign in the thirty-ninth year of Uzziah king of Judah, and he reigned one month in Samaria.

cnv.text: 猶大王烏西雅在位第三十九年，雅比的兒子沙龍登基作王；他在撒瑪利亞作王一個月。

ccb.text: 犹大王乌西雅执政第三十九年，雅比的儿子沙龙登基，在撒玛利亚执政一个月。
